title: AUROS AI — Strategic Integration Roadmap
sources: Greg Isenberg x James Dickerson — AI Marketing Masterclass (YouTube)
2026 AI Marketing landscape research (Gartner, Google, Deloitte, MarTech)

priority_1_must_have.name: Perplexity MCP — Deep Research Phase
priority_1_must_have.what: Replace/augment Tavily with Perplexity for synthesized research. Add as mandatory Step 0 before any client pipeline work.
priority_1_must_have.impact: Dramatically better output quality across all agents

priority_1_must_have.name: Remotion — Programmatic Video Ads
priority_1_must_have.what: Turn video scripts into actual MP4 files. React-based templates for 15s/30s/60s in vertical/horizontal/square. Zero cost.
priority_1_must_have.impact: GAME-CHANGER — closes the gap between scripts and actual video output

priority_1_must_have.name: Positioning Angles Agent
priority_1_must_have.what: Surface 5 positioning angles, score each, pick winner. Currently we skip positioning and jump to planning.

priority_1_must_have.name: Playwright + Firecrawl — Better Scraping
priority_1_must_have.what: Replace BeautifulSoup with Playwright for JS-rendered pages. Use Firecrawl for bulk competitor crawling.
priority_1_must_have.impact: Much better audit data — currently missing dynamic content

priority_1_must_have.name: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
priority_1_must_have.what: Monitor client visibility in AI search results (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). New discovery channel.
priority_1_must_have.impact: First-mover advantage. Critical for exhibition discovery.

priority_1_must_have.name: EU AI Act Compliance Module
priority_1_must_have.what: Auto-add AI disclosure labels, maintain audit trail, compliance checks in Quality Checker.
priority_1_must_have.impact: Legal requirement. Also a trust differentiator for European clients.

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: Orchestrator Agent (Pipeline Automation)
priority_2_nice_to_have.source: Video (30:43) + 2026 research (Gartner: 1,445% surge in multi-agent inquiries)
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Master agent that coordinates the 11-step pipeline. Handles handoffs, error recovery, decision points.
priority_2_nice_to_have.impact: Makes AUROS truly autonomous. Currently requires manual intervention.

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: Audience Segmentation
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Build segment-specific content tracks: families, history buffs, date night, tourists, school groups.

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: Opus Clip — Video Repurposing
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Auto-clip long exhibition walkthrough videos into 10-15 short-form pieces with captions and hooks.

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: Lead Magnet Agent
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Create exhibition guides, checklists, behind-the-scenes PDFs for email capture before ticket CTA.
priority_2_nice_to_have.impact: Adds email capture to conversion funnel

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: DR Copywriting Frameworks
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Add direct response copy frameworks to knowledge base. Conversion-first copy mode.
priority_2_nice_to_have.impact: Better conversion copy across all content

priority_2_nice_to_have.name: Make/Zapier Workflow Automation
priority_2_nice_to_have.what: Auto-trigger monthly reports, content publishing, performance alerts. Bridge before full orchestrator.
priority_2_nice_to_have.impact: Saves 4-6 hours per client per month

priority_3_future.name: Predictive Analytics in Performance Tracker
priority_3_future.what: Predict which content will perform before publishing. Forecast ROAS.

priority_3_future.name: Landing Page Generation Agent
priority_3_future.what: Generate actual ticket-selling landing pages for client exhibitions.
priority_3_future.impact: Full funnel control — not just content but destination pages

priority_3_future.name: Competitive Intelligence Agent
priority_3_future.what: Monitor competitor exhibitions (Meow Wolf, teamLab, etc.) — content, pricing, engagement.
priority_3_future.impact: Strategic advantage when scaling to multiple clients

priority_3_future.name: A/B Testing Agent
priority_3_future.what: Auto-generate content variants, track performance, optimize.

tasks: Install Perplexity API and create agents/shared/perplexity.py wrapper
Add DR copywriting frameworks to knowledge base
Add audience segmentation templates for The Imagine Team
Install Playwright, replace BeautifulSoup in audit/brand agents
Set up Remotion, build first exhibition video template (15s vertical)
Create lead magnet agent for exhibition guides
Build full Remotion template library (15s/30s/60s x 3 formats)
EU AI Act compliance module in Quality Checker
Make/Zapier integration for monthly report automation

competitive_advantages_gained: Remotion video generation: Most agencies can't auto-generate actual video ads
Research depth: Perplexity + Playwright gives competitive intelligence most agencies do manually
GEO-first: One of the first agencies offering AI search optimization as standard
EU AI Act compliance from day one: Trust differentiator for European clients
Full funnel in one system: Research -> strategy -> content -> video -> ads -> analytics
Multi-agent architecture: 90.2% better results than single-agent approaches (Gartner)
Speed: What takes agencies weeks, AUROS does in hours
